ddls:
CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition required to unlock the challenge */,
  "unlocked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the challenge can be unlocked */,
  "unlocked_by" TEXT /* User or team that unlocks the challenge */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for solving the challenge */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the challenge (e.g., cryptography, web, binary) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or team that created the challenge */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Detailed solution or hint for the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant or team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team registered for the CTF */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the team registered */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team captain or primary contact */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the team */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team is verified */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity timestamp for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant or team */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge related to the progress */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the challenge (e.g., solved, viewing) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last updated status */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made on the challenge */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the challenge in seconds */,
  "hints_used" INTEGER /* Number of hints used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_progress_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_progress_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant or team receiving the achievement */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge related to the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., badge for solving a challenge) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the achievement was awarded */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the achievement icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant or team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score accumulated by the participant */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the participant in the leaderboard */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the leaderboard update */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made */,
  "total_time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent on challenges */,
  "total_hints_used" INTEGER /* Total hints used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_details" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "registration_start" TEXT /* Start date and time for registration */,
  "registration_end" TEXT /* End date and time for registration */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL for the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition required to unlock challenges */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to unlock the challenge */,
  "challenges_required" INTEGER /* Number of challenges required to unlock */,
  "time_required" INTEGER /* Time required to unlock (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unlock_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unlock log */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who unlocked the challenge */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unlocked challenge */,
  "unlocked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge was unlocked */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Points awarded for unlocking the challenge */,
  "unlock_reason" TEXT /* Reason for unlocking the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unlock_logs_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unlock_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
